meaning: International Union of Students 国际学生联合会
examples: If not, consider adding a supplement of at least 600 IUs to your daily intake.
Of all the incremental mining algorithms, the IUS is the most advanced at present.
The result of detecting lymph nodes with IUS was influenced by their location and size.
The American Academy of Pediatrics says breast-fed infants should get 400 IUs of supplemental D daily.
Oral doses of up to 2, 000 IUs a day are considered safe and are available over the counter.
